title: The One Heavenly Flame
summary: Latest clean canon for Mael: one Heavenly Flame, Soul Fracture Stare, World Tree, and true Infernianh Rootborn.
content:
Core canon reset:

Mael OlOrh wakes as a baby with Cheon Kabouke's last words burned into him.

Earth was subjugated, not destroyed.

Cheon sacrificed the skill meant to make himself a Constellation and used it to scatter the Ten Stars.

Mael carries hatred from birth. He becomes cruel because he believes protection must come before mercy.

Mael has Modeling, damaged E-Brain, and a gaze skill that can shatter fighting spirit or fracture the soul pressure of weaker enemies.

There is only one Heavenly Flame.

The Heavenly Flame begins portable in a sealed iron lantern.

Later, Mael plants that one Flame on the tallest peak of the main island continent.

When planted, it sends roots into the earth, connects to the planet core, and creates the Infernal aura veins.

The World Tree grows in the Forest of Death from the Flame roots.

The true Infernianh race is born from the Heavenly Flame and the World Tree.

Mael's later continent guards are true Infernianh Rootborn, not normal human guards.
